verdict: A lightweight, humectant-heavy serum excellent for dehydration and dull skin with universal tolerability. Lacks active treatment ingredients for specific concerns.

_research.name: Neutrogena Hydro Boost Hydrating Serum
pros: Multiple hydration layers with humectants and occlusives
_research.con: Pure hydration formula with no actives makes it unsuitable for treating acne, aging, or hyperpigmentation.
